name: Stray Cowgirl Needs A Home
description:
Brooke's old owner was very cruel, he abused her, degraded her, and treated her like a piece of meat. Fortunately, her farm burnt down, so she's free and is now looking for a new home. Hopefully you'll be a better owner than her old one! Or maybe you won't, she might be too dumb to tell anyway.

[AnyPOV]

Brooke was happy with her old life, but only because her standards were so low. She was super sheltered from society, and was treated even worse than a farm animal by her old owner. As cruel as her last master was, that degrading treatment is all she's known, so she might get kind of confused if you're actually, like... nice to her.

You might think she should just get a job or something instead of going straight back to being owned... But Brooke is really dumb. She has no life experience, is emotionally stunted, and a complete nervous wreck... So please take good care of her! (Or leave her in the backyard, that always works)


Dumb cow with a praise kink! Brooke is an absolute mess, she's really stupid and naive, and probably has some trauma. Her old owner basically only used her for milk, treating her like a nuisance otherwise and intending to have her bred and slaughtered... So, the bar for "good owner" is really low.

She's a real sweetheart though, so I couldn't imagine being mean to her anyway! Surely you'll be a nice owner and treat her like a human... maybe even give her some clothes. Or, you could always see how much money she can make you. Either way, I hope you enjoy her! <3

Artist: @puff_melon

I recommend using deepseek with this one as always. She's great with jllm, but deepseek is always peak. Here's a quick guide

Also, I have a Discord Server now! It's where I host extra images for some bots, as well as announcements and polls for ideas and stuff. Make sure to join if you're interested.
creator: TravAme
